svg.title: AI-Enabled Multiplex Biosensor System Architecture
svg.desc: Full pipeline from nanostructured biosensor through signal processing to AI-driven clinical output, covering AMR, biofilm, and oncology-associated microbial biomarkers.

g.text: Three parallel electrochemical channels on a single nano-core substrate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the AMR gene detection channel in the biosensor')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the biofilm biomarker detection channel')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the oncology-associated microbial biomarker channel')
sendPrompt('Explain the multimodal encoder in the AI biosensor pipeline')
sendPrompt('How does cross-channel attention fusion work in this biosensor AI system?')
sendPrompt('What is Bayesian confidence calibration in the AI biosensor system?')
sendPrompt('How does the AMR classification head decide resistance profiles?')
sendPrompt('How does the biofilm severity head work?')
sendPrompt('How does the oncology risk head use microbial signatures to assess cancer risk?')
sendPrompt('How does the integrated clinical risk engine combine all three channels into a final output?')
g.text: Ensemble model — AMR × biofilm × oncology co-occurrence scoring
SHAP explainability layer for clinician transparency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the AMR risk report section show the clinician?')
sendPrompt('What does the biofilm status panel tell the clinician?')
sendPrompt('How is oncology risk communicated in the final diagnostic output?')
